strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of engineering experience, having worked in software development since 2006.
Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, satisfying the minimum educational requirement.
Demonstrates strong builder fluency and entrepreneurial experience as the Founder of GISCollective and through open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks recognized expertise and a long-term track record in AI; AI experience is limited to a single recent role starting in April 2025.
Does not demonstrate Director-level strategic influence or experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI platform adoption.
Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
response.justification: The role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with recognized, deep expertise in AI strategy and a proven track record of advising strategic customers. While the candidate easily meets the baseline requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience and holds a BS in Computer Science, their AI experience is nascent, limited entirely to a recent position at re:cinq (starting April 2025) working on MCP code generators. Their background reflects strong staff-level software craftsmanship and open-source development, but lacks the high-level, cross-organizational AI platform strategy and customer advisory experience necessary for this Director-level role.
